property.name: java.library.path
property.value:
C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17 in;C:\Windows\Sun\Java in;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Bureau\Bureau\project_test\.venv312\Scripts;c:\Users\MSI\AppData\Roaming\Code\User\globalStorage\github.copilot-chat\debugCommand;c:\Users\MSI\AppData\Roaming\Code\User\globalStorage\github.copilot-chat\copilotCli;C:\kafka in;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-8.0.452.9-hotspot in;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files

pm;C:\Program Files\OpenSSL-Win64 in;C:\Users\MSI\Downloads\apache-maven-3.9.10-bin\apache-maven-3.9.10 in;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17 in;C:\Program Files\MongoDB\Server\8.0 in;C:\Program Files\MongoDB\mongosh-2.5.3-win32-x64 in;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\WebStorm 2025.1.3 in;;D:\src lutter in;C:\php;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\CLion 2025.2.4 in;C:\Users\MSI\AppData\Local\Programs\IntelliJ IDEA 2025.2.5 in;C:\Users\MSI\AppData\Local\Programs\Ollama;c:\Users\MSI\.vscode\extensions\vscjava.vscode-java-debug-0.58.5 undled\scripts

testcase.name: Administrator approves a leave request
testcase.failure:
java.lang.AssertionError:
Expecting actual: 400 to be between: [200, 299]
at com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps.theRequestStatusChangesToX(LeaveSteps.java:109) at ✽.the request status changes to "Granted"(classpath:features/leave-request-service_approve-leave-request_20260316_113158.feature:13)
testcase.system-out:
Scenario: Administrator approves a leave request # features/leave-request-service_approve-leave-request_20260316_113158.feature:7 Given the user is authenticated # com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps.theUserIsAuthenticated() Given the leave request status is "In Progress" # com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps.theLeaveRequestStatusIsX(java.lang.String) And the user is the final approver in the approval chain # com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps.theUserIsTheFinalApproverInTheApprovalChain() And the user has not previously approved the request # com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps.theUserHasNotPreviouslyApprovedTheRequest() When the user approves the leave request # com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps.theUserApprovesTheLeaveRequest() And the system adjusts the leave balance according to the leave type # com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps.theSystemAdjustsTheLeaveBalanceAccordingToTheLeaveType() Then the request status changes to "Granted" # com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps.theRequestStatusChangesToX(java.lang.String) java.lang.AssertionError: Expecting actual: 400 to be between: [200, 299]
at com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps.theRequestStatusChangesToX(LeaveSteps.java:109) at âœ½.the request status changes to "Granted"(classpath:features/leave-request-service_approve-leave-request_20260316_113158.feature:13)
And the system displays "Request granted successfully" # com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps.theSystemDisplaysX(java.lang.String)
testcase.system-err: [main] INFO com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps - Authenticated with JWT token [main] INFO com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps - Status In Progress → test request ID 3 [main] INFO com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps - Role set: Administration [main] INFO com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps - Precondition: the user has not previously approved the request [main] INFO com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps - PUT /api/leave-requests/3/approve (approve, role=Administration) -> HTTP 400 [main] INFO com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps - Then validated, HTTP 400

testcase.name: Team Lead approves a leave request

error.message: Failed to parse the JSON document

testcase.error: io.restassured.path.json.exception.JsonPathException: Failed to parse the JSON document at io.restassured.path.json.JsonPath$ExceptionCatcher.invoke(JsonPath.java:1002) at Progress"(classpath:features/leave-request-service_approve-leave-request_20260316_113158.feature:21) Caused by: groovy.json.JsonException: Lexing failed on line: 1, column: 1, while reading 'L', no possible valid JSON value or punctuation could be recognized. at groovy.json.JsonLexer.nextToken(JsonLexer.java:86) at groovy.json.JsonLexer$nextToken.call(Unknown Source) at testcase.system-out:
Scenario: Team Lead approves a leave request # features/leave-request-service_approve-leave-request_20260316_113158.feature:16 Given the user is authenticated # com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps.theUserIsAuthenticated() Given the leave request status is "Pending" # com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps.theLeaveRequestStatusIsX(java.lang.String) And the user is an intermediate approver in the approval chain # com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps.theUserIsAnIntermediateApproverInTheApprovalChain() And the user has not previously approved the request # com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps.theUserHasNotPreviouslyApprovedTheRequest() When the user approves the leave request # com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps.theUserApprovesTheLeaveRequest() Then the request status changes to "In Progress" # com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps.theRequestStatusChangesToX(java.lang.String) io.restassured.path.json.exception.JsonPathException: Failed to parse the JSON And the system marks the manager's validation as TRUE # com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps.theSystemMarksTheManagerSValidationAsTrue()
testcase.system-err: [main] INFO com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps - Authenticated with JWT token [main] INFO com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps - Status Pending → test request ID 2 [main] INFO com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps - Role set: TeamLeader [main] INFO com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps - Precondition: the user has not previously approved the request [main] INFO com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps - PUT /api/leave-requests/2/approve (approve, role=TeamLeader) -> HTTP 200

testcase.name: User is not authorized to approve the leave request
testcase.system-out: Scenario: User is not authorized to approve the leave request # features/leave-request-service_approve-leave-request_20260316_113158.feature:24 Given the user is authenticated # com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps.theUserIsAuthenticated() Given the leave request status is "Pending" # com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps.theLeaveRequestStatusIsX(java.lang.String) And the user is not in the approval chain # com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps.theUserIsNotInTheApprovalChain() When the user attempts to approve the leave request # com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps.theUserAttemptsToApproveTheLeaveRequest() Then the system displays the error You are not authorized to modify the status of this request. # com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps.theSystemDisplaysTheErrorYouAreNotAuthorizedToModifyTheStatusOfThisRequest()
testcase.system-err: [main] INFO com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps - Authenticated with JWT token [main] INFO com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps - Status Pending → test request ID 2 [main] INFO com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps - Role set: Administration [main] INFO com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps - PUT /api/leave-requests/2/approve (approve, role=Administration) -> HTTP 400 [main] INFO com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps - Error confirmed, HTTP 400

testcase.name: User tries to approve a request that is not in a valid state
testcase.system-out: Scenario: User tries to approve a request that is not in a valid state # features/leave-request-service_approve-leave-request_20260316_113158.feature:30 Given the user is authenticated # com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps.theUserIsAuthenticated() Given the leave request status is "Granted" # com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps.theLeaveRequestStatusIsX(java.lang.String) And the user is in the approval chain # com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps.theUserIsInTheApprovalChain() When the user attempts to approve the leave request # com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps.theUserAttemptsToApproveTheLeaveRequest() Then the system displays the error If the request is not in a valid state ("Pending" or "In Progress"), validation is blocked. # com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps.theSystemDisplaysTheErrorIfTheRequestIsNotInAValidStateXOrXValidationIsBlocked(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)
testcase.system-err: [main] INFO com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps - Authenticated with JWT token [main] INFO com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps - Status Granted → test request ID 1 [main] INFO com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps - Role set: Administration [main] INFO com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps - PUT /api/leave-requests/1/approve (approve, role=Administration) -> HTTP 400 [main] INFO com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps - Error HTTP 400: This exceeds your validation authority

testcase.name: User tries to approve a request they have already previously approved
testcase.system-out: Scenario: User tries to approve a request they have already previously approved # features/leave-request-service_approve-leave-request_20260316_113158.feature:36 Given the user is authenticated # com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps.theUserIsAuthenticated() Given the leave request status is "Pending" # com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps.theLeaveRequestStatusIsX(java.lang.String) And the user is in the approval chain # com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps.theUserIsInTheApprovalChain() And the user has previously approved the request # com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps.theUserHasPreviouslyApprovedTheRequest() When the user attempts to approve the leave request # com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps.theUserAttemptsToApproveTheLeaveRequest() Then the system displays the error If the user has already validated previously, the validation is refused. # com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps.theSystemDisplaysTheErrorIfTheUserHasAlreadyValidatedPreviouslyTheValidationIsRefused()
testcase.system-err: [main] INFO com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps - Authenticated with JWT token [main] INFO com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps - Status Pending → test request ID 2 [main] INFO com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps - Role set: Administration [main] INFO com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps - Precondition: the user has previously approved the request [main] INFO com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps - PUT /api/leave-requests/2/approve (approve, role=Administration) -> HTTP 400 [main] INFO com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps - Error confirmed, HTTP 400
